tool.title: Fermi-Dirac Distribution
tool.about:
Computes the Fermi-Dirac distribution function f(E) = 1 / (1 + exp((E - Ef) / kT)) for a range of energies around the Fermi level.
Uses rappture2web.rp_library — outputs stream live to the browser.

about.label: Temperature
about.description: Temperature of the system. Higher temperatures broaden the Fermi-Dirac distribution.

about.label: Fermi Level
about.description: The Fermi energy level Ef. States below Ef are mostly occupied; above Ef mostly empty.

about.label: Energy Range ±
about.description: Plot energy from Ef - range to Ef + range.

about.label: Number of Points
about.description: Number of sample points along the energy axis.
